news.headline: Economist Peter Schiff criticizes Scott Bessent's role as Treasury Secretary, says he must find buyers for trillions in new debt annually to support Trump's tax cuts.
news.summary: Economist Peter Schiff criticized President-elect Donald Trump's appointment of hedge fund executive Scott Bessent as the U.S. Treasury Secretary, suggesting that he should be called the "Secretary of the Debt" instead. Schiff believes Bessent's role will involve continuing the Ponzi scheme due to Trump's promised tax cuts, potentially leading to increased government borrowings. Trump, however, remains confident in his proposed task force DOGE to reduce wasteful spending without further borrowing. The tweet by Schiff on X criticized Trump's decision and highlighted concerns about the new Treasury Secretary's responsibilities.

news.headline: US House Speaker Johnson: I believes the debt limit will not come due until summer 2025 - Punchbowl Reporter on X
Westinghouse's eVinci™ Control System gains U.S. licensing milestone from NRC for its I&C platform, the first microreactor to achieve this.
news.summary: Westinghouse Electric Company has revealed that the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission has given the green light on their latest eVinci™ Advanced Logic System® (ALS) Version 2 (v2) instrumentation and control (I&C) platform through a Final Safety Evaluation Report on two topical reports. This milestone approval establishes the eVinci microreactor as the sole microreactor with an NRC-approved I&C system, paving the way for independent operation.

news.headline: StoneX Group Inc. subsidiary, StoneX Digital International Limited, approved as a VASP in Ireland by Central Bank, enabling digital asset business expansion.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, StoneX Digital International Limited, a branch of StoneX Group Inc. (NASDAQ: SNEX), received approval from the Central Bank of Ireland to function as a Virtual Asset Service Provider (“VASP”). This allows them to conduct a digital asset business. The approval showcases StoneX Group's ongoing global growth into digital asset services for institutional clients.

news.headline: FFW Corp's dividend news: $0.30 per share, payable on Dec 27, 2024, record on Dec 13, 2024. ($39.00 Close:11/26/24)
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, in Wabash, Indiana, FFW Corporation (OTC PINK: FFWC) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.30 per share for its common stock. FFWC, the parent company of Crossroads Bank, closed at $39.00 on November 26, 2024. Shareholders of record on December 13, 2024, will receive the dividend on December 27, 2024.

news.headline: Collegiate Cricket League (CCL) launched, promoting cricket in US colleges with support from USA Cricket and NCL Dallas.
news.summary: Bringing together colleges across the country, the Collegiate Cricket League (CCL) has been established as the leading organization for collegiate cricket. Supported by USA Cricket and NCL, this initiative aims to showcase the world's second most popular sport. The launch was announced in Dallas on December 4, 2024.

news.headline: SpotitEarly uses AI, trained canines, and breath samples to detect breast, lung, prostate, and colorectal cancers with one non-invasive test.
news.summary: A cutting-edge platform has been developed that is capable of detecting breast, lung, prostate, and colorectal cancers all through a single, non-invasive test. The technology was created by SpotitEarly, a biotech startup based in Englewood, N.J. This innovative approach to cancer screening utilizes artificial intelligence. The platform holds significant promise for early cancer detection and potentially improving survival rates. The development was announced on December 4, 2024. This breakthrough has the potential to revolutionize cancer screening processes, reaching a wide audience due to its non-invasive nature, and may pave the way for more effective and efficient healthcare interventions.

news.headline: First Fidelity Bank chooses Cotribute for account opening, aiming to streamline process for HSA applications.
news.summary: First Fidelity Bank, based in Anaheim, California, has chosen Cotribute's Consumer Account Opening module to streamline the process for opening accounts for Health Savings Accounts (HSAs). This decision aims to enhance efficiency and convenience for customers initiating HSA applications.

news.headline: Globex Mining Enterprises reports results from first four Ironwood drill holes in Quebec; deposit located 2.6 km east of Cadillac.
news.summary: Globex Mining Enterprises Inc. has released the assay results from the initial four (4) drill holes at the Ironwood gold deposit in Cadillac Township, Quebec. The deposit, situated 2.6 km east of Cadillac, is fully owned by Globex. The company's shares are traded as GMX on the Toronto Stock Exchange, G1MN on various platforms including Frankfurt and Munich, and as GLBXF on the OTCQX International in the US. The announcement was made on December 04, 2024, in Rouyn-Noranda, Quebec.

news.summary: A report on Education Technology (Ed Tech) and Smart Classrooms has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global market for this sector is valued at US$152.7 billion in 2023, with projections indicating it will grow to US$443.7 billion by 2030, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 16.5% from 2023 to 2030. news.headline: BAB, Inc. declares cash distribution of three cents per share, consisting of 1 cent and 2 cent quarterly and special distribution, payable on January 9, 2025.
news.summary: In Deerfield, Illinois on December 4, 2024, BAB, Inc. (OTCQB: BABB) revealed a dividend distribution of three cents ($0.03) per share. This distribution comprises a regular quarterly distribution of one cent ($0.01) per share and a special distribution of two cents ($0.02) per share. Shareholders of record as of December 23, 2024, are set to receive this payment on January 9, 2025, as declared by the company's Board of Directors.

news.headline: CustomGPT.ai named a Top 7 Emerging Leader in GenAI by GAI Insights, alongside notable companies like OpenAI and Microsoft.
news.summary: In Boston on December 4, 2024, CustomGPT.ai, a company specializing in no-code AI solutions, was recognized as a Top 7 Emerging Leader in GenAI by GAI Insights, a prominent GenAI analyst firm. The accolade was given in GAI Insights' recent buyers' report, where CustomGPT.ai stood out for its innovative no-code approach to AI technology.

news.headline: Christy Gessler to be 2025 Chairman of Texas REALTORS® Board. Captive with Freedom 512 RE Group in Liberty Hill.
news.summary: Christy Gessler, from Freedom 512 Real Estate Group in Liberty Hill, has been appointed as the Chairman of the Board for Texas REALTORS® in 2025. This announcement was made in Austin, Texas, on December 4, 2024. Gessler will be joining others who have also been appointed for the upcoming year.

news.summary: A partnership between PerfectServe and Five9 will boost patient care and operational efficiency by integrating PerfectServe's healthcare communication tools with Five9's Intelligent Virtual Agents. This collaboration was announced on December 4, 2024, in Knoxville, Tennessee. PerfectServe, known for its cloud-based clinical solutions, aims to improve healthcare services, while Five9 specializes in virtual agent technology. The merger is expected to significantly enhance services for patients and streamline operations for healthcare providers.

St. Louis Fed's Musalem suggests cautious approach to interest rate cut in December meeting, emphasizing need for policy flexibility.
news.summary: St. Louis Fed President Alberto Musalem's remarks at a recent economic symposium suggest a potential debate within the Federal Reserve regarding an interest rate cut at the upcoming Dec. 18 meeting. Musalem emphasized the progress made in fighting inflation but also warned of risks, advocating for cautious approaches to rate cuts. He mentioned the gradual convergence of inflation to the Fed's 2% target and the need for easing policy over time. However, he highlighted the importance of maintaining policy options and suggested reconsidering the pace of interest rate reductions or pausing to assess the economic outlook. The article implies that the Fed may face challenges balancing economic strength and inflation risks.

news.headline: ECB's President Lagarde: The direction of rates is down, pace not pre-determined.
JCP&L finishes winter maintenance to ensure power reliability. Offers tips for managing heating bills. $FE. 100 characters.
news.summary: A subsidiary of FirstEnergy Corp., Jersey Central Power & Light (JCP&L), based in Holmdel, New Jersey, has recently finished conducting preventive maintenance and inspections to strengthen its electric grid. The company is providing customers with useful tips to effectively manage their heating bills during the ongoing season. The initiative comes as part of efforts to ensure efficient energy consumption and cost-effective solutions for customers.

news.headline: Former President Trump is reportedly considering replacing Hegseth with DeSantis as Pentagon head.
Co-founder of Rarible discusses challenges of NFT market at Benzinga event, warns against speculative practices in loyalty programs.
news.summary: During the Benzinga Future of Digital Assets event, Alex Salnikov, co-founder and chief strategy officer of Rarible, participated in a panel discussion with Ian Horne, head of content for Money20/20 Amsterdam. The conversation centered on the opportunities and challenges of incorporating non-fungible tokens (NFTs) into brand loyalty strategies within the growing Web3 ecosystem. Salnikov highlighted the negative impact of speculative practices in 2021, which led to skepticism towards NFT technology. He noted that the market was flooded with short-term profit schemes, creating a bubble and tarnishing the image of NFTs in many communities. Salnikov drew parallels to the recent trend of meme coins and cautioned that similar patterns could generate temporary interest but pose long-term obstacles for the industry.

Philip Vieira has joined Needham Bank as Vice President, Senior Small Business Relationship Manager. Reported on Dec. 4, 2024.
news.summary: Needham Bank, located in Needham, Massachusetts, has recently welcomed Philip Vieira to their Commercial & Industrial Lending team as the Vice President and Senior Small Business Relationship Manager. Vieira will report to Brian Sutton, the Senior Vice President and Director of Middle management. The addition of Vieira aims to bolster the bank's services in small business lending, marking an important move in their growth strategy.

news.headline: Avelo Airlines expands in North Carolina with 10 new routes, 27 total, $44 fares, 5 aircraft, 100 jobs.
news.summary: Avelo Airlines has announced the addition of 10 new routes, bringing the total number of nonstop routes from North Carolina to 27. They will be offering affordable one-way fares starting at $44. Additionally, Avelo will be stationing five aircraft in North Carolina, potentially generating up to 100 new jobs in the area. The expansion showcases Avelo's dedication to enhancing their services and reach in the region.

news.headline: Oak View Group (OVG) launches DE&I Career Readiness Program, ASCEND, at CFG Bank Arena in Baltimore on 12/13 for underrepresented students. Equips with skills, mentorship in sports, entertainment, and hospitality.
news.summary: A recently launched initiative led by Oak View Group (OVG) is focused on providing underrepresented students with essential skills, mentorship, and practical experience in the fields of sports, entertainment, and hospitality. news.headline: Age of Union commits $287,000 to The Juma Institute for Amazon protection and new knowledge center.
news.summary: Age of Union has recently solidified its dedication to worldwide conservation efforts through a significant two-year collaboration with The Juma Institute. MISS DIG 811 plays a pivotal role in preventing damages, with the upcoming event expected to draw a large audience including members and stakeholders.
